name: which
description: Locate a program in the user's PATH

name: -s
options.description: No output, return 0 if all the executables are found, 1 if not

name: -a
options.description: List all instances of executables found, instead of just the first

script:
for i in $(echo $PATH | tr ":" "
"); do find $i -maxdepth 1 -perm -111 -type f; done
